programme.title: Golmaal: Fun Unlimited
programme.desc: The story revolves around the lives of four guys named Gopal, Lucky, Madhav, and Laxman who all absurdly fall for the same girl. Hence, begins the hilarious race to win her heart.

programme.title: Golmaal Returns
programme.desc: Gopal¡¯s life hits choppy waters when he gets stuck on a yacht for a night upon rescuing an attractive young woman by fighting off some goons. Now, he has his wife suspecting him of having an affair and a police officer on his tail.

programme.title: Agnipankh
programme.desc: Three Indian Air Force pilots are captured and taken captive by Pakistani troops. While in jail, they meet other Indians and plan a jailbreak.

programme.title: Patas

programme.title: Surya 420
programme.desc: A transgender man struggles to realise his sexual orientation while dealing with the social stigma and taboo related to gender transition in the society.

programme.title: Billa 2
programme.desc: Small-time diamond smuggler David befriends Goa-based gangster Abbasi. However, when David begins to build inroads with an international criminal, Abbasi is not happy.

programme.title: Jaanbaaz Commando

programme.title: Personal Interest
programme.desc: Tatiana makes her escape from prison and seeks a hideout in a remote village of Pavlovka, in her late grandmother's house. There she meets Maxim who has come to the village to take a break from the hectic city life. Instant chemistry sparks between them. Everything would be just fine were it not for Tatiana's ex-boyfriend, Oleg, who comes to the village looking for her. Tatiana is forced to tell Maxim the whole truth about herself. She tells him about the robbery she committed together with Oleg and how she took all the blame on herself and then escaped from prison. Maxim assures her that he will be by her side no matter what and will help her get through all this.

programme.title: A Picture to Remember
programme.desc: Masha is in love with Igor, her college mate, and wants to marry him, but he does not seem in much of a hurry to lead the girl to the altar.

programme.title: The Surface
programme.desc: Two strangers, both at the end of their rope, suddenly meet in the middle of the unpredictable waters of Lake Michigan.

programme.title: Midnight Ride
programme.desc: A house wife just left her cop husband, when she picks up Justin Mckay she'll wish she never did as she's plunged into a nightmare and the grip of a psychotic killer.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This Story Is About A 19Year Old Girl Named Chunari, Who Dreams Of Marriage And A Happy Family. However, She Becomes Entangled In The Chains Of Deceit, Finding Herself On The Path To Becoming A Dahej Daasi, Which Is A Tradition Still Prevalent In The Backward Regions Of Rajasthan. The Show Unfolds Into A Compelling Drama Of Tradition Versus Rebellion, Love Versus Oppression.

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The Story Highlights The Exploitation Happening With The ‘Bunkars' In Banaras, Whose Craft Is Appreciated All Around The World, But They Are Paid Peanuts By The Traders. Amidst This, Blooms A Love Story Between The Two Opposites – Gauri, A Bunkar And Garv, A Trader. The Story Is Of Gauri Who Belongs To The Bunkar Community Facing A Series Of Incidents That Destroy Her Family And Swears To Bring About A Change In Their Life And Stop The Exploitation By Directly Trading The Sarees. This Becomes A Battle With Traders Creating Hurdles In Her Life But She Is Unstoppable.

programme.title: Beti Hamari Anmol
programme.desc: In this hugely inspirational success story, Anmol, a small town girl, not only fights the societal obstacles faced by any small town girl in our country but also takes on the social stigma she has had to face for being so short heighted that she has been termed as a “dwarf”. Anmol, with her strong will power and belief in herself, fights the hate she has had to receive from her in-law's. Anmol becomes a doctor with the support of her husband, in the same hospital where her father works as a peon, to win back her dignity as well as bring a lot of pride to her and her in law's family.

programme.title: Har Har Bhakti
programme.desc: Listen to Har Har Bhakti Devotional songs and start your day with praise of gods and goddesses. These songs are composed to inspire reverence, devotion, and connection with the divine.

programme.title: Jerry the Golfer
programme.desc: Jane sets up the golf ball and takes a shot, which perfectly lands in the hole.Jerry takes a shot, but the ball barely moves.Jerry hits the ball, and it flies off, breaking a window

programme.title: Juggler
programme.desc: Super Hungry" is a comedic adventure showcasing Jerry's insatiable appetite and Jane's playful attempts to feed him. Jane's idea of using "Hunger Syrup" leads to unexpected consequences as Jerry accidentally consumes the entire bottle, causing his hunger to intensify. A hilarious chase ensues as Jerry devours everyt_hing in sight, leaving Jane both amazed and exhausted. With a clever twist involving chili and a bucket of water, Jerry's hunger is finally satiated, resulting in laughter and relief for both characters

programme.title: Music Masti
programme.desc: Jerry's TV time is interrupted by Jane, who introduces him to an interactive book of alphabets and images. Jerry's playful antics and laughter lead to a series of imaginative associations between the alphabet and objects. They _hinage in a joyful exchange, using toys and everyday items to represent the letters and create a fun learning experience. The scene ends with a _hint of more playful learning adventures to come

programme.title: Magic Marker
programme.desc: JERRY, a curious and mischievous toddler, playing on the floor withsome toys. He notices amagic marker on the coffee table and picks it up.He starts to draw on the walls and furniture, creating colorful and abstract designs.

programme.title: BirthdayCake
programme.desc: Jerry playfully disrupts Jane's cleaning routine by scattering toys and bowls. He surprises Jane by juggling the toys and later the crockeries, showcasing his dexterity and coordination. Jane joins in the fun, and they _hinage in a playful juggling act together, creating a harmonious and entertaining moment in their home.

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: When a power company worker finds an abandoned eagle's nest precariously perched atop a wind turbine the SECRET LAB KIDS build a homemade rocket to fire a rope up to him so he can lower the nest to safety.

programme.title: A Gem of a Deal
programme.desc: When a con artist purchases Nicky's granny's house for a fake gemstone necklace, the SECRET LAB KIDS must learn about minerals in order to save granny from ruin.

programme.title: Fashion Genes
programme.desc: In order to have the best girl modeling her designs, Nicky decides to clone herself.

programme.title: Amusement park
programme.desc: ," Jane and Jerry _hinage in a playful dance-off, constantly trying to one-up each other. Their antics escalate as they use various props to outdo the other, leading to a comical series of mishaps. However, when their beloved music player breaks, they realize the power of their shared passion for music and come together to create their own joyful tune, ending on a heartwarming note of friendship and celebration.

programme.title: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: A close-upof the aliens' feet as they walk into Jane and Jerry's room. They wake upto see the aliens have taken over their house. The aliens break the glass with laserbeams that come out of their eyes.Jane and Jerry run for their lives as the aliens chase them through the house. Janefinds a torch and uses it as a weapon to defend herself

programme.title: Drone Attack
programme.desc: Jerry's mischievous behavior leads to a mess of toys and books scattered around the living room. Jane tries to catch the thrown objects but ends up getting hit herself. However, Jerry realizes Jane's sadness and starts helping her collect the items. They work together, with Jerry attempting to balance a pile of books and Jane using a box to collect the toys. After some mishaps, they successfully gather everyt_hing, but when the box breaks, they find themselves buried under the pile. They laugh together, realizing the joy in their shared experience.

programme.title: The poachers In The park !
programme.desc: Zoe and her mother nurse an injured Grizzly cub back to health and release it into the wild

programme.title: The Forest Fire
programme.desc: Zoe and Harvey witness a lightning strike that begins a forest fire

programme.title: The I Wish I had Captain Ten's powers!
programme.desc: Jane wishes to have the same powers as the main character in her favorite video game

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: Jerry grows into a giant after wearing a special ring gadget. Jane tries to evade him but is eventually captured and carried around like a toy. She manages to escape by using the ring to shrink Jerry back to his normal size. They reconcile, and Jane playfully throws the ring away, bringing an end to their giant-sized adventure.

programme.title: The I Wish I had the prettiest Girl Friend in the Universe
programme.desc: Cyril wishes to meet the most beautiful girl in the universe.

programme.title: Lazy
programme.desc: JaneandJerryarepackingandkeepingfruits,bottle,hat,toys,clothesinsideapicnicbasket.Thentheygooutsidethehouse

programme.title: The I Wish my Dog Could Speak less
programme.desc: Robert and Jane make the wish to make Carbo super smart

programme.title: Santa
programme.desc: Jerry's boredom during a board game leads to a playful adventure. Jane introduces him to puzzle mazes, and they solve them together, enjoying the chall_hine. Jerry surprises Jane by creating a real-life maze using household items, leading to a joyful exploration where they navigate the maze together. They find their way out, celebrate their accomplishment, and eagerly enter the maze again, _hinting at more exciting adventures to come

programme.title: Jerry the Golfer
programme.desc: Jane sets up the golf ball and takes a shot, which perfectly lands in the hole.Jerry takes a shot, but the ball barely moves.Jerry hits the ball, and it flies off, breaking a window

programme.title: The peter's Birthday
programme.desc: Powerkids Kartoon Channel

programme.title: The Secret of Long John pepper
programme.desc: Powerkids Kartoon Channel

programme.title: Jerry the Golfer
programme.desc: Jane sets up the golf ball and takes a shot, which perfectly lands in the hole.Jerry takes a shot, but the ball barely moves.Jerry hits the ball, and it flies off, breaking a window

programme.title: The Seagull Invasion
programme.desc: Jane and Jerry try to shoo the seagull out of the house, but it continues to flyaround, causing more chaos. The seagull starts to take over the house, making itselfat home and pus_hing Jane and Jerry out.The two siblings come up with a plan totake back their home

programme.title: Domino's Effect
programme.desc: In their imaginative world, Jerry transforms into a baby superhero, emulating heroic actions and surprising Jane with his playful antics. Jerry's mischievousness leads to both laughter and chall_hines as he playfully interrupts Jane's daily activities. However, when faced with a real threat in the form of a cockroach, Jerry's true superhero nature emerges, and he comes to Jane's rescue. With their bond str_hinthened, Jane rewards Jerry with a real superhero cape, acknowledging his extraordinary spirit. Together, they triumph over obstacles and celebrate their super-powered adventures.

programme.title: Magic Marker
programme.desc: JERRY, a curious and mischievous toddler, playing on the floor withsome toys. He notices amagic marker on the coffee table and picks it up.He starts to draw on the walls and furniture, creating colorful and abstract designs.

programme.title: BirthdayCake
programme.desc: Jerry playfully disrupts Jane's cleaning routine by scattering toys and bowls. He surprises Jane by juggling the toys and later the crockeries, showcasing his dexterity and coordination. Jane joins in the fun, and they _hinage in a playful juggling act together, creating a harmonious and entertaining moment in their home.

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: When a power company worker finds an abandoned eagle's nest precariously perched atop a wind turbine the SECRET LAB KIDS build a homemade rocket to fire a rope up to him so he can lower the nest to safety.

programme.title: A Gem of a Deal
programme.desc: When a con artist purchases Nicky's granny's house for a fake gemstone necklace, the SECRET LAB KIDS must learn about minerals in order to save granny from ruin.

programme.title: Fashion Genes
programme.desc: In order to have the best girl modeling her designs, Nicky decides to clone herself.

programme.title: Amusement park
programme.desc: ," Jane and Jerry _hinage in a playful dance-off, constantly trying to one-up each other. Their antics escalate as they use various props to outdo the other, leading to a comical series of mishaps. However, when their beloved music player breaks, they realize the power of their shared passion for music and come together to create their own joyful tune, ending on a heartwarming note of friendship and celebration.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Adventure 2 Ep 40
programme.desc: This series follows Vick, Briar and Bramble on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Ep 39
programme.desc: This light-hearted comic romp, designed for children between the ages of 4 and 12, is set in a lovely wooded wonderland in rural Northeast China. Though the surroundings might seem idyllic, deep in the heart of the region peace has been disrupted by the dastardly Logger Vick, who schemes to transform the majestic forest into his own personal lumberyard!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Ep 40
programme.desc: This light-hearted comic romp, designed for children between the ages of 4 and 12, is set in a lovely wooded wonderland in rural Northeast China. Though the surroundings might seem idyllic, deep in the heart of the region peace has been disrupted by the dastardly Logger Vick, who schemes to transform the majestic forest into his own personal lumberyard!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 39
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 40
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln S1 Ep 34
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln S1 Ep 35
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Armor Monster Ep 20
programme.desc: One day, 12-year-old Zachary once again met the subway "0" which her mother took nine years ago, and the appearance of the subway seems to have some connection with the necklace left by her mother. In order to find her mother, Zachary stepped on the magic subway without hesitation! When the train arrived at the station, Zachary found that he had come to a magical world of elves. He also met the elf Rooney chased by hunters. In order to protect the Rooney, they fled to the underground city. Here, Zachary meets Scarlett, a red haired girl, and Zachary accidently becomes the Rooney and is regarded as a half-face hunter who is under searched with big bonus in the underground city. In order to leave the underground city to find his mother, Zachary has to agree to fight with the old wizard, the King of the underground city. Under Scarlett's training, Zachary grew up fast. In the battle, his determination to protect the Rooney inspired the strength in the necklace and defeated the old wizard. And just when the angry wizard decided to show his real strength, the real half hunter came to the rescue. The real half hunter even had the same necklace. The unexpected encounter of the two necklaces triggered the emergence of spirits and demons which are eager for energy. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs S1 Ep 39
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu Cubs is a brand-new edutainment series showing children that learning can be fun. At this scenic Pine Tree Kindergarten, all the cubs observe the world in their own creative and wondrous ways. Here you will learn everything from the value of friendship to exploring the mysteries of science and language.Bablu Dablu Cubs will teach kids how to help others while preparing themselves for life in this beautiful world. This show is a colorful paradise for kids, teeming with adventures around every corner.

Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln S1 Ep 35
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Armor Monster Ep 20
programme.desc: One day, 12-year-old Zachary once again met the subway "0" which her mother took nine years ago, and the appearance of the subway seems to have some connection with the necklace left by her mother. In order to find her mother, Zachary stepped on the magic subway without hesitation! When the train arrived at the station, Zachary found that he had come to a magical world of elves. He also met the elf Rooney chased by hunters. In order to protect the Rooney, they fled to the underground city. Here, Zachary meets Scarlett, a red haired girl, and Zachary accidently becomes the Rooney and is regarded as a half-face hunter who is under searched with big bonus in the underground city. In order to leave the underground city to find his mother, Zachary has to agree to fight with the old wizard, the King of the underground city. Under Scarlett's training, Zachary grew up fast. In the battle, his determination to protect the Rooney inspired the strength in the necklace and defeated the old wizard. And just when the angry wizard decided to show his real strength, the real half hunter came to the rescue. The real half hunter even had the same necklace. The unexpected encounter of the two necklaces triggered the emergence of spirits and demons which are eager for energy. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs S1 Ep 39
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu Cubs is a brand-new edutainment series showing children that learning can be fun. At this scenic Pine Tree Kindergarten, all the cubs observe the world in their own creative and wondrous ways. Here you will learn everything from the value of friendship to exploring the mysteries of science and language.Bablu Dablu Cubs will teach kids how to help others while preparing themselves for life in this beautiful world. This show is a colorful paradise for kids, teeming with adventures around every corner.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs S1 Ep 40
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu Cubs is a brand-new edutainment series showing children that learning can be fun. programme.title: Bablu Dablu Adventure 2 Ep 39
programme.desc: This series follows Vick, Briar and Bramble on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Adventure 2 Ep 40
programme.desc: This series follows Vick, Briar and Bramble on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Ep 39
programme.desc: This light-hearted comic romp, designed for children between the ages of 4 and 12, is set in a lovely wooded wonderland in rural Northeast China. Though the surroundings might seem idyllic, deep in the heart of the region peace has been disrupted by the dastardly Logger Vick, who schemes to transform the majestic forest into his own personal lumberyard!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Ep 40
programme.desc: This light-hearted comic romp, designed for children between the ages of 4 and 12, is set in a lovely wooded wonderland in rural Northeast China. Though the surroundings might seem idyllic, deep in the heart of the region peace has been disrupted by the dastardly Logger Vick, who schemes to transform the majestic forest into his own personal lumberyard!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 39
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 40
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln S1 Ep 34
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It' s a good neighbourhood. However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It' s a good neighbourhood. However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It' s countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer' s back is turned.

programme.title: Cutie Cubies
programme.desc: An animation series about the adventures of four aliens - Cubies: Captain, Boatswain, Navigator, and Doctor. Having arrived on our planet and disguised as representatives of the local flora and fauna of the cubic form: a yellow chicken, a red rabbit, a blue aquarium and a bush of green grass, they are learning the diverse phenomena of our planet Earth.

programme.title: Monsuno
programme.desc: The series revolves around re-awakened Monster DNA, called Monsuno, that finds its way into the unsuspecting hands of adventure-seeking teenagers Chase, Jinja, and Bren. Accompanied by their Monsuno, Lock, Charger, and Quickforce, they are searching for Chase' s father Jeredy Suno, the creator of the Monsuno

programme.title: Heroes of Envell
programme.desc: Present days. Saint Petersburg. Four friends – Art, Kira, Phil and Vic are the coolest gamers in school. Eventually they find a suspicious laptop with «Heroes of Envell» game installed on it. Turns out that this very laptop is a portal to another dimension, a game realm which is full of adventures and real-life danger. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here.

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Cindrella Ep 10
programme.desc: The character of Chota Buddha is inspired from the happiness spread by laughing buddha. Chota Buddha is the fun-spirited lead of this series who loves helping the people of his village, Changjiang.

programme.desc: Bablu Dablu Squad is an animated show for Kids. The magical Neva teams up with her best friends Briar, Bramble, and Vick to help any and all in need on Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Simba The Lion King Ep 25
programme.desc: The Lion King is shot by poachers, as part of Shere Khan the Bengal tiger's plot to overthrow the king from his throne. Young Simba, son of the Lion King, suspects something strange and subconsciously senses that the Tiger will one day be his greatest enemy. Simba and his two sisters are adopted into a wolf pack.

programme.title: Robinhood EP 25
programme.desc: Robin's house was burned to ashes by the order of Alwyn, the Baron of Nottingham. Robin and his cousins Will, Winifred and Jenny flee into Sherwood Forest, hoping to escape persecution. They end up encountering a group of bandits led by Little John, who dubs himself as Big John during the beginning of the series, until Robin pokes fun renaming him "Little John" for playing with a cat.

programme.title: Mission Odyssey

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Anya Kahaniyaan
programme.desc: Raja Rasoi Aur Anya Kahaniyaan is a culinary history show that explores the food of the royals and their erstwhile states. The show takes it's viewers through an amazing journey of anecdotes, folktales, architecture, art, history and landscape and delves into the unique customs and traditions of the various provinces. All these culminate into beautiful renditions of the recipes unique to those regions. This new season of Raja Rasoi aur Anya Kahaniyaan focuses on the royal families as protagonists and explores their personal stories and journeys that shaped their present day food practices.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Devlok With Devdutt Pattanaik
programme.desc: Devlok With Devdutt Pattanaik: A Show That Explores Indian Mythology In A Manner Never Attempted Before. Renowned Mythologist Devdutt Pattanaik Dips Into Subjects Through Lesser-Known Tales And Narratives, While Attempting To Explore And Interpret The Questions That Arise From The Treasure Trove That Is Indian Mythology. With An Easy And Unassuming Storytelling Style. Devdutt Pattanalk Demystifies Mythology In Easy-To-Understand, Everyday Language In This Unique Series That Brings Ancient Stories To Life In A Contemporary Context. Each Episode Takes Viewers On A Fantastic Voyage Through Myriad Characters, Events, Stories, Symbols, And Rituals That Form The Basis Of Identity For The People Of The Subcontinent.

programme.title: Indipedia
programme.desc: A light and peppy anchor driven half-hour episodic series that explores the reasons, bellefs and logic behind the customs and rituals observed as a norm In India, often so casually that most of us have never really asked why they arethe way they are.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: India is known for its remarkable architecture and serene landscapes. Its rich history is steeped in mystery its vastness - lends itself to several stories and urban legends. Ekaant takes you through the abandoned roads and alleys of some of India's historic locations. Travelling through the spread out palaces and deserted forts, the show documents and investigates the eerie processes of abandonment of each site. How flourishing towns and cities came to be in ruins, is the question each episode seeks to answer. Ekaant explores the ceasing of life and the triumph of nature even in the most populated of places and takes you on the road no longer travelled.

programme.title: Devlok With Devdutt Pattanaik
programme.desc: Devlok With Devdutt Pattanaik: A Show That Explores Indian Mythology In A Manner Never Attempted Before. Renowned Mythologist Devdutt Pattanaik Dips Into Subjects Through Lesser-Known Tales And Narratives, While Attempting To Explore And Interpret The Questions That Arise From The Treasure Trove That Is Indian Mythology. With An Easy And Unassuming Storytelling Style. Devdutt Pattanalk Demystifies Mythology In Easy-To-Understand, Everyday Language In This Unique Series That Brings Ancient Stories To Life In A Contemporary Context. Each Episode Takes Viewers On A Fantastic Voyage Through Myriad Characters, Events, Stories, Symbols, And Rituals That Form The Basis Of Identity For The People Of The Subcontinent.

programme.title: To The Moon
programme.desc: Between 1969 and 1972 twelve men walked on the surface of the moon. It was seen as the first chapter in an ambitious program of space exploration. But what started with NASA's Apollo missions ended with the Apollo missions.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: In the porous limestone of Canada's West Coast, great forces are at work under the ground, building and eroding the underground into fantastic shapes. In this episode we'll witness George's explorations of these massive underground cave systems.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Miners in Chihauhau, Mexico, has just discovered an amazing sight. The Mexican authorities are only opening up the cavern to scientists and film crews - 'Angry Planet' plans to be one of the first in!

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: In the first week of December - the height of storm season in Australia, we plan to travel with Jimmy Deguara, the most experienced of Australian stormchasers.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: Too small to mix with others, Pemba needs a rhino friend his age, enter orphaned 34 day old, Dwayne. Under-staffed and over-worked, Karen is eager to get the two little guys living together, it should be easy - but little rhinos don't always comply.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: Little Nyani was born premature and was sent to the rhino orphanage. Raising a premature calf is a first for the orphanage. One day the little one is running around, the next she's in Onderstepoort's Veterinary Hospital, fighting for her life.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: Rejected by his mother, Tswalu has been through a lot. It's suspected he's broken his leg, but he's not well enough to travel to the veterinary hospital. He's one of only 800 desert black rhinos left in the world and they'll do anything to save him.

programme.title: Return Of The Spider Monkeys
programme.desc: A baby spider monkey named Infinity was stolen from the forest. After a 7-year rehabilitation, she is ready to return to the wild. But this time she is not alone. She joins a makeshift group of orphaned monkeys and her newborn baby.

programme.title: Chameleons Of The World
programme.desc: Discover the life of chameleons as they've never been seen before. It's a journey of discovery into the forests of Madagascar, the savannahs of east and southern Africa and the Namib desert.

programme.title: Band Baajaa Bride
programme.desc: Band Baajaa Bride-The Makeover Show, gives Indian Brides a chance to look like a model by selecting a dream outfit, getting the best make up in the industry and working with the best hairstylists, getting her skin treated and losing weight with experts.

programme.title: Lock Stock And Two Smoking Tikkas
programme.desc: Marut Sikka knows authentic Indian flavours like nobody else. From Kashmir to Kanyakumari, and West Bengal to Gujarat, he delves into the secrets of each region and brings out its special flavours.

programme.title: Love Bites With Joey
programme.desc: Love Bites with Joey, hosted by supermodel Joey Matthew is a food show about food's most important ingredient - Love. Her tryst with food began at an early age, and it led her into the kitchen where she developed a passion for cooking wholesome food.

programme.title: Holy Martyr George, Serbia
programme.desc: The Church of St George, and the Karadjordjevic dynasty's Mausoleum, tell the story of the First Serbian Uprising the Ottoman authorities: George Petrovic, nicked names Black Georges. It is the pearl of the cultural and historical heritage of Topola and O"&"plenac in Serbia.

programme.title: Mar Elias Monastery
programme.desc: Mar Elias monastery lies on the side of the road from Jerusalem and Bethlehem. It is maintained by the Greek-Orthodox church, and by local tradition Elijah rested here while fleeing from Queen Jezebel

programme.title: Orhei Vechi Monastery, Moldova
programme.desc: Old Orhei is a Moldovan historical and archaeological complex located in Trebujeni, which is approximately 60 kilometres (37 mi) north-east of Chişinău on the Răut River in the Republic of Moldova. The ancient city of Orheiul Vechi is a natural and historical complex, located in a narrow bend of the Raut River. The natural landscape of limestone rock, eroded by the river, is combined with archaeological vestiges of the ancient Trypillian civilization. The Orthodox monastery is still inhabited by a handful of Orthodox monks, who maintain the church at the top of the hill. The caves are still functional as chapels. The caves contain an array of historical artifacts.

programme.title: Aosta Cathedral Part 1, Aosta Valley, Italy
programme.desc: Dating back to the beginning of Christianity's diffusion, and founded near an ancient Roman Forum in the 4th century, discover The Aosta Cathedral. Remodeled with a neoclassical façade built in 1848, it is now also housing a museum of the Aosta Valley's "&"sacred Art.

programme.title: Ein Kerem, Israel Part 2
programme.desc: Ein Kerem, the place of the birth of Saint John the Baptist, as well as the visitation of Mary, but also a chic and pastoral touristic place…

programme.title: The Good Samaritan Museum, Israel Part 2
programme.desc: On the road from Jerusalem to the Dead Sea, discover the Good Samaritain Museum, an archaeological and historical site. This museum, which is the only mosaic museum in the country and one of only three in the world, has artefacts which were unearthed in Judea, Samaria and Gaza on display.

programme.title: Church of Ecce Homo & Convent of the Sister of Zion, Israel
programme.desc: The Convent of the Sisters of Zion is a Roman Catholic convent of the Congregation of Notre-Dame de Sion, located near the eastern end of the Via Dolorosa in the Old City of Jerusalem. The convent was built in 1857 by Marie-Alphonse Ratisbonne.The site in"&"cludes the Church of Ecce Homo, also known as the Basilica of Ecce Homo, named for Pontius Pilate's Ecce homo speech which is traditionally thought to have taken place on the pavement below the church.

programme.title: Ein Kerem Israel Part1
programme.desc: Ein Kerem, the place of the birth of Saint John the Baptist, as well as the visitation of Mary, but also a chic and pastoral touristic place…

programme.title: Sea of Galilee, Israel Part 1
programme.desc: On the shores of the Sea of Galilee, also called the Lake of Tiberias, discover a freshwater lake with an area of 166 m2 located in the North-East of Israel. Of course this lake is of great importance to Christians : at this particular place, several episodes of Jesus' life took place.

programme.title: Sea of Galilee, Israel Part 2
programme.desc: On the shores of the Sea of Galilee, also called the Lake of Tiberias, discover a freshwater lake with an area of 166 m2 located in the North-East of Israel. Of course this lake is of great importance to Christians : at this particular place, several episodes of Jesus' life took place.

programme.title: Gethsemane, Israel
programme.desc: At the foot of the Mount of Olives, in a place called Gethsemane visit the Church of All Nations. The Mount of Olives, which rises to the east of Jerusalem, separates the Holy City from the desert of Judea...

programme.title: HOTLES in Oman
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? LUXURY DREAMS takes you on a voyage of discovery of rare addresses, always top luxury, often quite unusual. Today direction Oman.

programme.title: Atzara Old Town, Sardinia, Italy
programme.desc: Atzara is a comune in the Province of Nuoro in the Italian region Sardinia, located about 90 kilometres north of Cagliari and about 45 kilometres southwest of Nuoro. Located in Barbagia, the original village date back to the years around 1000 and develope"&"d near the spring of Bingia de giosso, still existing.

programme.title: Arnad town, Aosta Valley, Italy
programme.desc: Arnad town in Aosta Valley is known for the production of the D.O.C Montjovet wine. The small medieval village stands on the banks of the Dora Baltea. It is situated on the banks of the Dora Baltea. Arnad has its roots in tradition: from rock climbing a"&"mong the most famous Alps to the walks in the woods of chestnut or between churches and castles, testimonies of a great past. Nature, sport, history, genuine flavors, relaxation.

programme.title: In Alberobello Trulli, Italy
programme.desc: Alberobello is a village in Puglia where ancient traditions still characterize an entire community to this day. Perhaps the masterpiece of Puglia is Alberobello itself. No tourist manual ignores it. Every geography book for middle schools carries a photog"&"raph of its Trulli. Alberobello is a perfect village whose formula has become a style in the rigor with which it has been applied.

programme.title: Tabatabaei Natanzi Historical House, Iran
programme.desc: The ancient city of Kashan is located in the northern part of the Isfahan province in Iran. Throughout Persian history, Kashan has always been the core of ceramics, lustreware, knitting, and weaving, producing decorated pottery, glazed tiles, and finest w"&"ool and silk carpets. This is one of them, built by Seyed Jafar Tabatabaee, during the Qajar dynasty: The Tabatabaei Historical House...

programme.title: Herodion National Park, Israel
programme.desc: Herodion, one of Herod the Great's most ambitious building projects, served the Judean King as summer palace, fortress, monument, burial ground and district capital. Of all the sites built by the ""builder-king"", Herodion is the only one that bears his n"&"ame.The immense Herodion complex, fifteen kilometers south of Jerusalem and about five kilometers south-east of Bethlehem, near the ancient roads to the dead Sea, was built between 23 and 20 B.C.E. It was divided into two sections: Upper Herodion, which c"&"ontained the palace set within a circular fortress on an artificial cone-shaped mountain and Lower Herodion, at the base of the mountain, which consisted of numerous palace annexes for use by the king's family and friends, and for the central offices of "&"the district capital.

programme.title: Banias Spring, Israel
programme.desc: Located at the foot of Mount Hermon, north of the Golan Heights, we can find a spring. This spring is the Banias River source, one of the main tributaries of the Jordan River. Here, archaeologists uncovered a shrine dedicated to Pan and related deities. L"&"et find out about the remains of an ancient city founded sometime after Alexander the Great's conquest.

programme.title: Ein Kerem, Israel Part 1
programme.desc: Ein Kerem, the place of the birth of Saint John the Baptist, as well as the visitation of Mary, but also a chic and pastoral touristic place…

programme.title: The Good Samaritan Museum, Israel Part 2
programme.desc: On the road from Jerusalem to the Dead Sea, discover the Good Samaritain Museum, an archaeological and historical site. This museum, which is the only mosaic museum in the country and one of only three in the world, has artefacts which were unearthed in J"&"udea, Samaria and Gaza on display. You are in the area of Ma'ale Adumim (Red Heights), on the same road that pilgrims used to take on their way to Jerusalem, particularly those coming from the Galilee via the Jordan Valley and Jericho, in the footsteps of"&" Jesus and John the Baptist…

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: The Twin Cities, Minneapolis and St. Paul, while distinct in character, share a deep appreciation for music and cultural diversity. Chunz and Makh set out to discover the sounds and messages of unity emerging in the African community with traditional performer Christian Adeti and dive into a new genre of Somali rap with rapper DJ Fawzi. With it's vibrant modern culture and rich musical history, The Twin Cities are a special destination you won't want to miss.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Kansas City, Missouri, is an integral part of jazz history in America. Shaped by legends who once graced its streets, it is bursting with deep history, mouth-watering cuisine and a lively jazz scene. World-renowned trumpeter, tap dancer, and entertainer, Lonnie McFadden and celebrated singer and tap dancer Chloe McFadden, show Chunz and Makh what it's all about. From finger-licking barbecue to sports events and a bustling nightlife, this city is a cultural hub offering endless opportunities for a fun-filled getaway.

programme.title: USA Through the Great Outdoors
programme.desc: Place is inextricably linked to who we are as human beings. See the American Great Outdoors in its purest and most authentic light – through the eyes of locals.

programme.title: National Parks Adventure
programme.desc: A team of modern day explorers take an off-trail adventure through the national parks of the USA, showing the awe-inspiring beauty found within America's most legendary outdoor playgrounds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Tony sets out to the American Heartland to find the unsung heroes of the food scene -- chefs who are fighting the good fight in cities all over America, creating heroic food that could compete with New York's finest.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain
